resources.string: Location permission is required to check whether you\'re inside a nature reserve.
Location permission is denied. Open settings to grant it.
Fine (precise) location is recommended. Coarse location may be too imprecise to resolve boundaries.
Location services are turned off. Enable them in system settings.
Couldn\'t get a GPS fix. Make sure you\'re outdoors with a clear sky and try again.
You are not inside a declared nature reserve or national park.
Low GPS accuracy — result may be unreliable near boundaries.
You may be close to a boundary.
